Pie.welcome_description: After sign-in, users land on the PIE Management home. The three business areas on the left all belong to PIE Management and cover material master data, BOM structures, and routing design.
Pie.items_description: Maintain product, assembly, and material master data with the 6-digit item code as the business key.
Pie.boms_description: Manage multi-level BOM structures by parent item, including component usage and scrap rate.
Pie.routings_description: Define routing steps by item, including operation sequence, workstation, and standard cycle time.
